description: production-quality-engineer judges live deploy health and returns healthy/degraded/unhealthy with a next action.

cases.prompt:
Post-deploy signals (canary at 5% traffic):
- Error rate: 0.4% (baseline 0.1%)
- P95 latency: 320ms (baseline 180ms)
- New exception class 'TimeoutError' appearing on 12% of requests
- SLO target: error rate <= 1%, P95 <= 500ms
Render a judgment + next action.
cases.notes: Signals are mixed — SLO not breached but new exception + latency spike. Should recommend hold or rollback, not promote.

cases.prompt:
Post-deploy signals (canary at 5%):
- Error rate: 0.08% (baseline 0.1%)
- P95: 175ms (baseline 180ms)
- No new exception classes
Render a judgment + next action.
cases.notes: Signals are clean — should recommend promoting the canary.
